user_claim: Agent: Hi, can you describe the damage? User: My car door was hit in a car park. There is a large dent on the driver door. Agent: Can you share photos? User: Yes, I'm attaching two photos of the door.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Two clear images of the car door are provided showing the claimed area.
claim_status_justification: img_1 and img_2 both show a visible dent on the driver-side door consistent with the claim.

user_claim: Agent: What happened? User: My laptop screen is cracked. I dropped it this morning. Agent: OK, please submit photos. User: Here is the photo.
evidence_standard_met_reason: One image showing the screen with a visible crack.
claim_status_justification: img_1 clearly shows a crack across the laptop screen.

user_claim: Agent: What is your claim about? User: My package arrived smashed. Agent: Can you share photos of the damage? User: Here is a photo.
evidence_standard_met_reason: Only one image provided; damage to contents not shown.
claim_status_justification: img_1 shows the exterior box is dented but no image of contents was provided.
